  constructor

    intro h
    obtain ⟨R, hR⟩ := h
    have hfcnl : fcnl_on R (Univ U) := hR.left
    have hfcnl_inv : fcnl_on (invRel R) (Univ V) := hR.right
    set f := fcnl_to_fcn R (Univ U) with hf_def
    set g := fcnl_to_fcn (invRel R) (Univ V) with hg_def
    use f, g
    constructor
    · ext v
      simp only [Function.comp_apply, id_eq]
      have hv : v ∈ Univ V := by trivial
      obtain ⟨u, hu⟩ := fcnl_exists hfcnl_inv hv
      have hgu : g v = u := fcnl_to_fcn_def hfcnl_inv hv hu.left hu.right
      rw [hgu]
      have hu_univ : u ∈ Univ U := by trivial
      have hRuv : R u v := hu.left
      obtain ⟨v', hv'⟩ := fcnl_exists hfcnl hu_univ
      have hfu : f u = v' := fcnl_to_fcn_def hfcnl hu_univ hv'.left hv'.right
      have : v = v' := fcnl_unique hfcnl hu_univ hRuv hv'.left
      rw [hfu, this]
    · ext u
      simp only [Function.comp_apply, id_eq]
      have hu : u ∈ Univ U := by trivial
      obtain ⟨v, hv⟩ := fcnl_exists hfcnl hu
      have hfu : f u = v := fcnl_to_fcn_def hfcnl hu hv.left hv.right
      rw [hfu]
      have hv_univ : v ∈ Univ V := by trivial
      have hinvRvu : invRel R v u := hv.left
      obtain ⟨u', hu'⟩ := fcnl_exists hfcnl_inv hv_univ
      have hgv : g v = u' := fcnl_to_fcn_def hfcnl_inv hv_univ hu'.left hu'.right
      have : u = u' := fcnl_unique hfcnl_inv hv_univ hinvRvu hu'.left
      rw [hgv, this]
  · -- ∃ f g, f ∘ g = id ∧ g ∘ f = id → U ∼ V
    intro ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩
    use graph f
    constructor
    · intro u _
      use f u
      constructor
      · rfl
      · intro v2 hv2
        exact hv2
    · intro v _
      use g v
      constructor
      · simp only [invRel, graph]
        have : f (g v) = v := congr_fun hfg v
        exact this
      · intro u2 hu2
        simp only [invRel, graph] at hu2
        have : g (f u2) = u2 := congr_fun hgf u2
        rw [← this, hu2]

    set g := fcnl_to_fcn hinv
    use f, g
    constructor
    · funext v
      simp only [Function.comp_apply, id_eq]
      have hv : v ∈ Ran R := by
        rw [hR.right.right]
        trivial
      obtain ⟨u, huv⟩ := hv
      have hu : u ∈ Dom R := by
        exact Dom_def R u v huv
      have hfcnl := hR.left
      have hfcnl_inv := hinv
      have hgu : g v = u := by
        apply fcnl_to_fcn_spec hfcnl_inv
        exact huv
      have hfu : f u = v := by
        apply fcnl_to_fcn_spec hfcnl
        exact huv
      rw [hgu, hfu]
    · funext u
      simp only [Function.comp_apply, id_eq]
      have hu : u ∈ Dom R := by
        rw [hR.left.right]
        trivial
      obtain ⟨v, huv⟩ := hu
      have hv : v ∈ Ran R := Ran_def R u v huv
      have hfu : f u = v := fcnl_to_fcn_spec hR.left huv
      have hgv : g v = u := fcnl_to_fcn_spec hinv huv
      rw [hfu, hgv]
  · intro ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩
    use graph f
    constructor
    · constructor
      · intro x y1 y2 hy1 hy2
        simp only [graph, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hy1 hy2
        rw [← hy1, ← hy2]
      · ext u
        simp only [Dom, graph, Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.mem_univ, iff_true]
        use f u
    · constructor
      · intro y x1 x2 hx1 hx2
        simp only [graph, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hx1 hx2
        have : g (f x1) = g (f x2) := by rw [hx1, hx2]
        simp only [Function.comp_apply, id_eq] at hgf
        have h1 : (g ∘ f) x1 = x1 := by
          have := congr_fun hgf x1
          exact this
        have h2 : (g ∘ f) x2 = x2 := by
          have := congr_fun hgf x2
          exact this
        simp only [Function.comp_apply] at h1 h2
        rw [← h1, ← h2, this]
      · ext v
        simp only [Ran, graph, Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.mem_univ, iff_true]
        use g v
        have : (f ∘ g) v = v := congr_fun hfg v
        simp only [Function.comp_apply] at this
        exact this

by
  constructor
  · -- U ∼ V → ∃ f g, f ∘ g = id ∧ g ∘ f = id
    intro h
    obtain ⟨R, hR⟩ := h
    have hfcnl := fcnl_of_equinum hR
    have hinv := inv_equinum hR
    have hfcnl_inv := fcnl_of_equinum hinv
    set f := fcnl_onto_fun hfcnl with hf_def
    set g := fcnl_onto_fun hfcnl_inv with hg_def
    use f, g
    constructor
    · ext v
      simp only [Function.comp_apply, id_eq]
      have hRan : Ran R = Univ V := hR.right.right.left
      have hv : v ∈ Univ V := trivial
      rw [← hRan] at hv
      obtain ⟨u, huv⟩ := hv
      have hgu : g v = u := by
        apply fcnl_onto_fun_unique hfcnl_inv
        exact huv
      have hfu : f u = v := by
        apply fcnl_onto_fun_unique hfcnl
        exact huv
      rw [hgu, hfu]
    · ext u
      simp only [Function.comp_apply, id_eq]
      have hDom : Dom R = Univ U := hR.right.right.right
      have hu : u ∈ Univ U := trivial
      rw [← hDom] at hu
      obtain ⟨v, huv⟩ := hu
      have hfu : f u = v := by
        apply fcnl_onto_fun_unique hfcnl
        exact huv
      have hgv : g v = u := by
        apply fcnl_onto_fun_unique hfcnl_inv
        exact huv
      rw [hfu, hgv]
  · -- ∃ f g, f ∘ g = id ∧ g ∘ f = id → U ∼ V
    intro ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩
    use graph f
    constructor
    · -- fcnl (graph f)
      exact fcnl_graph f
    constructor
    · -- fcnl (inv (graph f))
      rw [fcnl_iff_inv_fcnl_of_fcnl]
      · exact fcnl_graph f
      · intro v1 v2 u hv1 hv2
        have : g (f u) = g (f u) := rfl
        rw [← hv1, ← hv2] at this
        have hgf1 : (g ∘ f) u = u := by rw [hgf]; rfl
        simp only [Function.comp_apply] at hgf1
        rw [hv1] at hgf1
        have hgf2 : g v2 = u := by
          have : (g ∘ f) u = u := by rw [hgf]; rfl
          simp only [Function.comp_apply] at this
          rw [hv2] at this
          exact this
        rw [← hgf1, ← hgf2]
    constructor
    · -- Ran (graph f) = Univ V
      ext v
      simp only [Ran, mem_setOf_eq, graph, Univ]
      constructor
      · intro _; trivial
      · intro _
        use g v
        have : (f ∘ g) v = v := by rw [hfg]; rfl
        simp only [Function.comp_apply] at this
        exact this
    · -- Dom (graph f) = Univ U
      ext u
      simp only [Dom, mem_setOf_eq, graph, Univ]
      constructor
      · intro _; trivial
      · intro _; use f u

by
  constructor
  · intro h
    obtain ⟨R, h1, h2, h3⟩ := h
    have hex : ∀ (x : U), ∃ (y : V), R x y := by
      intro x
      obtain ⟨y, hy⟩ := h2 x
      exact ⟨y, hy.left⟩
    set f := fun x => Classical.choose (hex x) with hf_def
    have hf : ∀ x, R x (f x) := fun x => Classical.choose_spec (hex x)
    have hex' : ∀ (y : V), ∃ (x : U), R x y := by
      intro y
      obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := h3 y
      exact ⟨x, hx.left⟩
    set g := fun y => Classical.choose (hex' y) with hg_def
    have hg : ∀ y, R (g y) y := fun y => Classical.choose_spec (hex' y)
    use f, g
    constructor
    · funext y
      have hr1 : R (g y) (f (g y)) := hf (g y)
      have hr2 : R (g y) y := hg y
      exact h1 hr1 hr2
    · funext x
      have hr1 : R x (f x) := hf x
      have hr2 : R (g (f x)) (f x) := hg (f x)
      have : ∀ y, R x y → R (g y) y → g y = x := by
        intro y hxy hgy
        have := h1 hxy hgy
        have h1' : ∀ {x1 x2 : U} {y : V}, R x1 y → R x2 y → x1 = x2 := by
          intro x1 x2 y' h1' h2'
          obtain ⟨_, hu⟩ := h3 y'
          exact hu h1' ▸ hu h2'
        exact h1' hgy hxy
      exact (this (f x) hr1 hr2).symm
  · intro ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩
    use fun x y => f x = y
    constructor
    · intro x1 x2 y h1 h2
      have : g (f x1) = g (f x2) := by rw [h1, h2]
      simp only [congr_fun hgf] at this
      exact this
    · intro x
      exact ⟨f x, rfl, fun y hy => hy⟩
    · intro y
      use g y
      constructor
      · exact congr_fun hfg y
      · intro x hx
        rw [← hx]
        exact congr_fun hgf x

        have : (v, g v) ∈ inv R := hgv
        exact this

      exact hR.right.left (g v) v (f (g v)) hgvR hfgv
    · funext u

      have hu : u ∈ Dom R := by
        rw [hR.right.right.left]
        trivial
      have hfu := fcnl_to_fcn_def hfcnl hu
      have hfuDom : f u ∈ Dom (inv R) := by
        rw [dom_inv, hR.right.right.right]
        trivial
      have hgfu := fcnl_to_fcn_def hgcnl hfuDom
      have hgfuR : (g (f u), f u) ∈ R := hgfu
      exact hR.left u (g (f u)) (f u) hfu hgfuR
  · intro ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩
    use graph f

    · intro x₁ x₂ y h1 h2
      simp only [graph, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at h1 h2
      have : g y = g (f x₁) := by rw [h1]
      rw [congr_fun hgf x₁] at this
      have : g y = g (f x₂) := by rw [h2]
      rw [congr_fun hgf x₂] at this
      rw [← congr_fun hgf x₁, ← congr_fun hgf x₂, h1, h2]

      simp only [graph, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at h1 h2
      rw [← h1, ← h2]
    constructor
    · ext u

      constructor
      · intro _; trivial
      · intro _; use f u
    · ext v
      simp only [Ran, graph, Set.mem_setOf_eq, Univ]
      constructor
      · intro _; trivial
      · intro _
        use g v
        exact congr_fun hfg v

  constructor

  · -- Backward direction: ∃ f g, f ∘ g = id ∧ g ∘ f = id → U ∼ V
    intro ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩

    · -- one-to-one
      intro x1 x2 y hxy1 hxy2

      have h1 : (g ∘ f) x1 = x1 := congr_fun hgf x1
      have h2 : (g ∘ f) x2 = x2 := congr_fun hgf x2
      simp only [Function.comp_apply] at h1 h2
      rw [← h1, ← h2, this]
    constructor
    · -- onto
      intro y hy

        simp only [Function.comp_apply] at h1
        rw [← h1, hx]

      simp only [Function.comp_apply, id_eq]
      have : (g v, v) ∈ inv R := hgv
      simp only [inv_def] at this
      exact unique_of_fcnl hfcnl hfgv this
    · ext u
      have hfu := fcnl_to_fcn_def hfcnl u
      have hgfu := fcnl_to_fcn_def hfcnl_inv (f u)
      simp only [Function.comp_apply, id_eq]
      have : (f u, u) ∈ inv R := by
        simp only [inv_def]
        exact hfu
      exact unique_of_fcnl hfcnl_inv hgfu this
  · -- ∃ f g, f ∘ g = id ∧ g ∘ f = id → U ∼ V
    intro ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩
    use graph f
    define
    constructor
    · -- fcnl_on (graph f) (Univ U)
      define
      constructor
      · intro u _
        use f u
        rfl
      · intro u _ v1 v2 hv1 hv2
        simp only [graph_def] at hv1 hv2
        rw [← hv1, ← hv2]
    · -- fcnl_on (inv (graph f)) (Univ V)
      define
      constructor
      · intro v _
        use g v
        simp only [inv_def, graph_def]
        have : (f ∘ g) v = id v := congrFun hfg v
        simp only [Function.comp_apply, id_eq] at this
        exact this
      · intro v _ u1 u2 hu1 hu2
        simp only [inv_def, graph_def] at hu1 hu2
        have h1 : (g ∘ f) u1 = id u1 := congrFun hgf u1
        have h2 : (g ∘ f) u2 = id u2 := congrFun hgf u2
        simp only [Function.comp_apply, id_eq] at h1 h2
        rw [← h1, ← h2, hu1, hu2]

by
  constructor
  · intro h
    obtain ⟨R, hR⟩ := h
    have hfcnl := fcnl_of_match hR
    have hinv := match_inv hR
    have hfcnl_inv := fcnl_of_match hinv
    set f := fcnl_to_fcn hfcnl with hf_def
    set g := fcnl_to_fcn hfcnl_inv with hg_def
    use f, g
    constructor
    · funext y
      simp only [Function.comp_apply, id_eq]
      have hy : y ∈ Dom (inv R) := by
        rw [hR.right.right.left]
        trivial
      have hgy := fcnl_to_fcn_def hfcnl_inv hy
      have hgy' : (y, g y) ∈ inv R := hgy
      have hgy'' : (g y, y) ∈ R := by
        rw [inv_def] at hgy'
        exact hgy'
      have hgx : g y ∈ Dom R := by
        rw [hR.right.left]
        trivial
      have hfgy := fcnl_to_fcn_def hfcnl hgx
      have huniq := hR.left (g y) y (f (g y)) hgy'' hfgy
      exact huniq.symm
    · funext x
      simp only [Function.comp_apply, id_eq]
      have hx : x ∈ Dom R := by
        rw [hR.right.left]
        trivial
      have hfx := fcnl_to_fcn_def hfcnl hx
      have hfx' : (x, f x) ∈ R := hfx
      have hfx_inv : (f x, x) ∈ inv R := by
        rw [inv_def]
        exact hfx'
      have hfx_dom : f x ∈ Dom (inv R) := by
        rw [hR.right.right.left]
        trivial
      have hgfx := fcnl_to_fcn_def hfcnl_inv hfx_dom
      have huniq := hinv.left (f x) x (g (f x)) hfx_inv hgfx
      exact huniq.symm
  · intro ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩
    use graph f
    constructor
    · intro x y1 y2 hy1 hy2
      simp only [graph, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hy1 hy2
      rw [← hy1, ← hy2]
    constructor
    · intro y x1 x2 hx1 hx2
      simp only [graph, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hx1 hx2
      have h1 : g (f x1) = g (f x2) := by rw [hx1, hx2]
      have h2 : (g ∘ f) x1 = (g ∘ f) x2 := h1
      rw [hgf] at h2
      exact h2
    constructor
    · ext x
      constructor
      · intro hx
        trivial
      · intro _
        use f x
        simp only [graph, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    · ext y
      constructor
      · intro hy
        trivial
      · intro _
        use g y
        simp only [graph, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
        have : (f ∘ g) y = y := by rw [hfg]; rfl
        exact this

by
  constructor
  · -- U ∼ V → ∃ f g, f ∘ g = id ∧ g ∘ f = id
    intro h
    obtain ⟨R, hR⟩ := h
    set f := fun u => (hR.fcnl_on_univ.right u trivial).choose
    set g := fun v => (hR.fcnl_on_univ.left v trivial).choose
    use f, g
    constructor
    · ext v
      simp only [Function.comp_apply, id_eq]
      have hv : v ∈ Univ V := trivial
      have hg := (hR.fcnl_on_univ.left v hv).choose_spec
      have hf := (hR.fcnl_on_univ.right (g v) trivial).choose_spec
      have := hR.fcnl_on_univ.right v hv
      obtain ⟨u, hu⟩ := this
      have : f (g v) = v := by
        apply hR.fcnl_on_univ.right v hv |>.unique
        exact hf.right
        exact hg.right
      exact this
    · ext u
      simp only [Function.comp_apply, id_eq]
      have hu : u ∈ Univ U := trivial
      have hf := (hR.fcnl_on_univ.right u hu).choose_spec
      have hg := (hR.fcnl_on_univ.left (f u) trivial).choose_spec
      apply hR.fcnl_on_univ.left (f u) trivial |>.unique
      exact hg.right
      exact hf.right
  · -- ∃ f g, f ∘ g = id ∧ g ∘ f = id → U ∼ V
    intro ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩
    have hbij : one_to_one f ∧ onto f := by
      constructor
      · intro u1 u2 hfeq
        have : g (f u1) = g (f u2) := by rw [hfeq]
        simp only [← Function.comp_apply, hgf, id_eq] at this
        exact this
      · intro v
        use g v
        have : f (g v) = v := by simp only [← Function.comp_apply, hfg, id_eq]
        exact this
    exact ⟨graph f, bij_graph_iff_bij.mpr hbij⟩

by
  constructor
  · -- U ∼ V → ∃ f g, f ∘ g = id ∧ g ∘ f = id
    intro h
    obtain ⟨R, hR⟩ := h
    set f := fun u => (hR.fcnl_on_univ.has_fval u).choose with hf_def
    have hf : ∀ u, R u (f u) := fun u => (hR.fcnl_on_univ.has_fval u).choose_spec
    set g := fun v => (hR.inv_fcnl_on_univ.has_fval v).choose with hg_def
    have hg : ∀ v, R (g v) v := fun v => (hR.inv_fcnl_on_univ.has_fval v).choose_spec
    use f, g
    constructor
    · ext v
      have h1 : R (g v) v := hg v
      have h2 : R (g v) (f (g v)) := hf (g v)
      exact hR.fcnl_on_univ.unique trivial h2 h1
    · ext u
      have h1 : R u (f u) := hf u
      have h2 : R (g (f u)) (f u) := hg (f u)
      exact hR.inv_fcnl_on_univ.unique trivial h2 h1
  · -- ∃ f g, f ∘ g = id ∧ g ∘ f = id → U ∼ V
    intro ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩
    use graph f
    constructor
    · -- fcnl_on (graph f) (Univ U)
      define
      intro u _
      use f u
      define
      rfl
    · -- inv_fcnl_on (graph f) (Univ V)
      define
      intro v _
      use g v
      define
      have : f (g v) = v := congr_fun hfg v
      exact this

by
  constructor
  · intro ⟨f, hf⟩
    obtain ⟨g, hfg, hgf⟩ := one_one_onto_iff_inverse_pair.mp hf
    exact ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩
  · intro ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩
    exact ⟨f, one_one_onto_iff_inverse_pair.mpr ⟨g, hfg, hgf⟩⟩

by
  constructor
  · intro ⟨R, hR⟩
    obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := fcnl_exists hR.left
    obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := fcnl_exists hR.right.left
    use f, g
    constructor
    · funext v
      have hv : v ∈ Ran R := hR.right.right.right v
      obtain ⟨u, huv⟩ := hv
      have hfu : f u = v := hf.right u v huv
      have hgv : g v = u := hg.right v u (hR.right.right.left u v huv)
      simp [hfu, hgv]
    · funext u
      have hu : u ∈ Dom R := hR.right.right.left.symm ▸ (mem_univ u)
      obtain ⟨v, huv⟩ := hu
      have hfu : f u = v := hf.right u v huv
      have hgv : g v = u := hg.right v u (hR.right.right.left u v huv)
      simp [hfu, hgv]
  · intro ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩
    use graph f
    constructor
    · exact fcnl_graph f
    constructor
    · apply fcnl_of_graph_inv
      intro v
      use g v
      have : f (g v) = v := congrFun hfg v
      exact this
    constructor
    · intro u v huv
      simp [graph, Dom, Ran, Set.mem_sep_iff] at huv
      exact mem_univ u
    · intro v
      use g v
      simp [graph]
      exact congrFun hfg v

by
  constructor
  · intro h
    obtain ⟨R, hR⟩ := h
    have hinv := fcnl_inv_of_one_to_one hR
    use fcnl_to_fcn hR.left, fcnl_to_fcn hinv
    constructor
    · funext v
      simp only [Function.comp_apply, id_eq]
      have hv : v ∈ Ran R := hR.right.right v
      obtain ⟨u, huv⟩ := hv
      have : fcnl_to_fcn hinv v = u := fcnl_to_fcn_spec hinv huv
      rw [this]
      exact fcnl_to_fcn_spec hR.left huv
    · funext u
      simp only [Function.comp_apply, id_eq]
      have hu : u ∈ Dom R := hR.right.left u
      obtain ⟨v, huv⟩ := hu
      have : fcnl_to_fcn hR.left u = v := fcnl_to_fcn_spec hR.left huv
      rw [this]
      exact fcnl_to_fcn_spec hinv huv
  · intro ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩
    use graph f
    constructor
    · exact fcnl_graph f
    constructor
    · intro u
      use f u
      rfl
    · intro v
      use g v
      have : f (g v) = v := congrFun hfg v
      simp only [graph, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
      exact this
